description: You are the HR Manager at TechVenture Corp, where Q1 2025 hiring has just closed. Organize onboarding-related emails by creating an 'Onboarding_Q1' folder in Local Folders with subfolders 'Documents_Pending' and 'IT_Requests'. Route all relevant emails to these subfolders based on whether they concern missing paperwork or technical setup. Add IT Director Marcus Thompson (m.thompson@techventure-it.com) to your address book. Compose a draft email to Marcus Thompson in response to his most recent message about VPN access and security training to confirm the Monday start date and verify that IT setup for Johnson, Kim, and Chen will be complete. The draft must mention the start date or equipment readiness. Login: local account, no password needed.
